limitations: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or capex figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named initiatives and strategic framing only.
AI use cases are named (generative/agentic AI, advanced technology ecosystem) but no deployment status metrics or quantified business results are disclosed; concreteness capped at 3.

Risk disclosure includes named risk categories (regulatory, workforce, cybersecurity/vendor dependence) with some mechanism detail (how risks hit operations/compliance), supporting score 4; no quantified risk figures or formal named AI oversight body beyond the ERRC general mandate.
